channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Artificial intelligence changes across the US
item.description: As more companies implement artificial intelligence for daily tasks, some industry leaders are working to push back against certain aspects of the technology.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australia bans social media for children under-16
item.description: A social media ban for children under 16 passed the Australian Parliament on Friday in a world-first law.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Amazon worker strike: 5 things to know
item.description: Thousands of Amazon workers around the world went on strike Friday, demanding more pay and better working conditions during one of the retail giant's busiest weekends of the year.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Canadian news publishers sue OpenAI over alleged copyright infringement
item.description: A coalition of Canadian news publishers, including The Canadian Press, Torstar, Globe and Mail, Postmedia and CBC/Radio-Canada, has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI for using news content to train its ChatGPT generative artificial intelligence system.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought banana art for $6.2 million eats the fruit in Hong Kong
item.description: A cryptocurrency entrepreneur who had bought a piece of conceptual art consisting of a simple banana, duct-taped to a wall, for $6.2 million last week ate the fruit in Hong Kong on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Kanis Leung, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Canada sues Google over alleged anticompetitive practices in online advertising
item.description: The Competition Bureau of Canada has filed an antitrust lawsuit against Google, accusing the tech giant of abusing its dominant position in the online advertising technology market to stifle competition and harm advertisers, publishers, and consumers.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Canada sues Google over alleged anticompetitive practices in online ads
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Canada's antitrust watchdog said Thursday it is suing Google over alleged anticompetitive conduct in the tech giant’s online advertising business and wants the company to sell off two of its ad tech services and pay a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: La inteligencia artificial trasciende al espacio
item.description: Investigadores del grupo AIDA procedentes de la Universidad Politécnica de Madrid (UPM) han plantado cara a problemas tradicionales del sector aeroespacial gracias a la innovación tecnológica.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Australian Senate debates social media ban for under-16s
item.description: The major parties' support for the ban all but guarantees the legislation will become law. But many child welfare and mental health advocates are concerned about unintended consequences.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Coast Guard adds new cyber requirements for ship-to-shore cranes
item.description: The directive builds upon a mandate issued in February — the public notice doesn’t disclose specifics of the new requirements. The post Coast Guard adds new cyber requirements for ship-to-shore cranes first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: Australia's social media ban for kids is closer to becoming law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia’s House of Representatives on Wednesday passed a bill that would ban children younger than 16 years old from social media, leaving it to the Senate to finalize the world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Nvidia shows off a new genAI model that can create sound and music
item.description: Nvidia on Monday showed off a new generative AI (genAI) model that can be used to create all kinds of sounds and music: Fugatto (which stands for Foundational Generative Audio Transformer Opus 1).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Influencer houses are dead. Welcome to the production studio era
item.description: Influencers today look a lot more like Hollywood executives than ragtag social media users. And they’re buying up the real estate to prove it. A slew of creators have been buying plots of studio land to film and edit their content.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Interpol clamps down on cybercrime and arrests over 1,000 suspects in Africa
item.description: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) — Interpol arrested 1,006 suspects in Africa during a massive two-month operation, clamping down on cybercrime that left tens of thousands of victims, including some who were trafficked, and produced millions in financial damages, the global police organization said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MARK BANCHEREAU, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Free travel planner? Use AI for your next trip
item.description: I’m going to Europe soon, and planning my trip was a breeze. Yes, really! AI did a big chunk of the work for me — and it can help you plan your next getaway, too.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: PHP updates DOM API
item.description: PHP 8.4.1, an update to the longstanding server-side web scripting language, has been released with features including an updated DOM API that makes it easier to work with HTML5 documents. Accessible from php.net, PHP 8.4.1 was released November 21.
item.dc:creator: Info World
